scoring.label: 重要度，不等同于事实真伪
scoring.formula: 基础分 + 来源 + 主题优先级 + 时效 + 影响信号 + 相关性 + 证据完整度 + 多源印证 - 编辑降权
scoring.confidenceNote: 置信度仅反映已收录来源的权重与独立来源数量，不替代事实核查。

brief.headline: Lockheed rolls out cheaper Patriot, MBDA showcases low-cost interceptor
brief.summary: 本期从 6 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。
signals: 军事动态：Displayed in a truck mounted configuration at the show, the new MBDA weapon is an upgrade to the company’s ground-launched, Advanced Short Range Air-to-Air Missile (ASRAAM) a…
军事动态：1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.
军事动态：Trump said the ex-Qatari 747 is going to be upgraded soon when asked about the lack of defensive countermeasures on the new jet.
